=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/missingLayerContext.ts(24,8): error TS377034: Missing 'ServiceB | ServiceC' in the expected Layer context. effect(missingLayerContext)
/.src/missingLayerContext.ts(31,20): error TS377034: Missing 'ServiceC' in the expected Layer context. effect(missingLayerContext)


==== /.src/missingLayerContext.ts (2 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    import type * as Layer from "effect/Layer"
    
    class ServiceA extends Effect.Service<ServiceA>()("ServiceA", {
      succeed: { a: 1 }
    }) {}
    
    class ServiceB extends Effect.Service<ServiceB>()("ServiceB", {
      succeed: { a: 2 }
    }) {}
    
    class ServiceC extends Effect.Service<ServiceC>()("ServiceC", {
      succeed: { a: 3 }
    }) {}
    
    declare const layerWithServices: Layer.Layer<ServiceA, never, ServiceB | ServiceC>
    
    function testFn(layer: Layer.Layer<ServiceA>) {
      return layer
    }
    
    // @ts-expect-error
    testFn(layerWithServices)
           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS377034: Missing 'ServiceB | ServiceC' in the expected Layer context. effect(missingLayerContext)
    
    function testFnWithServiceB(layer: Layer.Layer<ServiceA, never, ServiceB>) {
      return layer
    }
    
    // @ts-expect-error
    testFnWithServiceB(layerWithServices)
                       ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS377034: Missing 'ServiceC' in the expected Layer context. effect(missingLayerContext)
